set.office: U.S. Representative AL-3 (Chairman, House Armed Services Committee; Trump-endorsed 2026 reelection)

profile.confidence_note: 2026-06-02 — federal-tier evidence sweep: Heritage Action 64% (119th), FRC True Blue 100%, ACU 77%, SBA Pro-Life A+, NRA-A. Cross-party DEVIATIONS: Ukraine-supplemental YEA + $549K career pro-Israel PAC support incl. $52K AIPAC PAC (HASC Chair, defense-hawk posture); rhetorically distanced from NDAA TRICARE-gender-care ban (though his roll-call vote supported it). Opposed forcing airlines to rehire COVID-fired pilots (slippery-slope conscience-rights deviation flagged).
profile.religion: Baptist (member, Baptist church in Saks, AL)
profile.background: U.S. Representative AL-3 since Jan 2003; Chairman, House Armed Services Committee since Jan 2023. Calhoun County Commission 1987-1990; Alabama House 1994-2002 (minority leader). JSU + Birmingham School of Law (lawyer). Married Beth Phillips 1982, three children; resides Weaver, AL. Won AL R primary May 2026 (Trump-endorsed).

mike-rogers.notes_append: 2026-06-02 FEDERAL EVIDENCE FINALIZATION: Heritage Action 64% (119th)/67% lifetime — moderate; pushed $150B defense add as HASC Chair. FRC True Blue 100% (115th). Key roll calls: HR 8404 RFMA NAY (RC513 2022); HR 5 Equality Act NAY (RC39 2021); HR 5 Parents Bill of Rights AYE (RC161 2023); HR 26 Born-Alive YEA (RC29 2023); HR 21 Born-Alive YEA (RC27 2025); HR 2 Secure-the-Border YEA (RC209 2023); HR 22 SAVE Act YEA (RC102 2025); S.5 Laken Riley YEA (RC23 2025); HR 38 Concealed Carry Reciprocity AYE (RC663 2017); HR 1 One Big Beautiful Bill AYE (RC243 2025); HR 8035 Ukraine Supplemental YEA (RC151 2024); HR 8034 Israel Supplemental YEA (RC152 2024). Voted to sustain objection to AZ electors Jan 6 2021 (RC17). Led DoD COVID vaccine-mandate REPEAL in FY23 NDAA. SBA Pro-Life A+ + cosponsor Pain-Capable + cosponsor Defund PP. Signed Riley Gaines 'Stand With Women' pledge 2024-08-06. Cross-party DEVIATION: Ukraine hawk, AIPAC PAC recipient, defense-spending plus-up posture (low Heritage score reflects).

set.office: U.S. Representative AZ-01 (WITHDREW Feb 2026 — pivoted to Arizona Secretary of State 2026 R primary; filed Statement of Interest 2026-02-03)

profile.confidence_note: 2026-06-02 — CANDIDACY CURRENCY: withdrew AZ-01 Feb 3-13 2026 to run for AZ Secretary of State (July 21 2026 R primary). Federal-tier evidence sweep is thin outside election_integrity (her signature issue as former AZ Secretary of State staffer, AZGOP Chair Jan 2024-Jan 2026, 2024 Trump elector). Most categories null — sparse-data trap acknowledged; tally reflects what is documented, not inference from party.
profile.religion: Unknown — no public statement of personal faith located in Wikipedia, AP, Ballotpedia, or campaign sweep
profile.background: Former AZGOP Chairwoman Jan 27 2024 – Jan 25 2026 (Trump-endorsed for that role). Former AZ Secretary of State's office staffer under D Katie Hobbs; precinct captain, registrar, statewide poll-observer trainer. 2024 Trump presidential elector for AZ. Launched AZ-01 House bid Oct 2025; received dual Trump endorsement (w/ Jay Feely) Jan 6 2026; withdrew AZ-01 Feb 3-13 2026 to run for AZ Secretary of State. BA Arizona State University; b. 1969 Queens, NY.

gina-swoboda.notes_set: CANDIDACY UPDATE (2026-06-02): WITHDREW from 2026 AZ-01 R primary Feb 3-13 2026 — filed Statement of Interest 2026-02-03 for AZ Secretary of State R primary (July 21 2026). She will NOT appear on AZ-01 ballot. AZGOP Chair Jan 2024 – Jan 2026, succeeded by Sergio Arellano. Federal-tier evidence (her signature area): defended voter-roll integrity / opposed Fontes mass-mail-in posture / praised SCOTUS Virginia noncitizen-roll-removal ruling — TRUE on election_integrity q1, q3. Affirmed biological-sex categories in women's sports (KJZZ 2025-03-27 quote) — TRUE on biblical_marriage q2. All other categories NULL — no documented federal-policy statements located (campaign-website assets Cloudflare-blocked; AZGOP press archive returns zero hits on Prop 139 / abortion / Equality Act / firearms / Ukraine / etc.). NOT a Voter Reference Foundation founder per Wikipedia/AP (clarified). Refer to AZ Secretary of State race for active candidacy tracking.

2.note: Quote: 'I, Gina, do not think that restricting girls sports to girls is an attack on transgender people. I think it's protecting women.' — affirms biological-sex categories

1.note: AZGOP under Swoboda applauded SCOTUS Virginia noncitizen-roll-removal ruling; Dec 2025 election-integrity update backed AZ Court of Appeals voter-roll cleanup ruling — pro citizenship-verification posture

3.note: Whiteboard talk + repeated AZGOP statements opposing SoS Fontes's voter-roll-management failures — anti mass-mail-in / pro chain-of-custody posture

set.office: U.S. Representative AZ-01 (2026 R primary — Trump-endorsed Jan 6 2026 dual-endorsement w/ Swoboda; open Schweikert seat; primary July 21 2026)

profile.confidence_note: 2026-06-02 — federal evidence sweep on AZ-01 open-seat candidate. CROSS-PARTY DEVIATIONS dominate: publicly defended mail-in voting as 'safe' (Oct 2025 — contradicts conservative orthodoxy); criticized Trump and Trump supporters on Jan 6 as 'failure in leadership' and a 'huge mistake'; compared Trump's J6 pardons to 'BLM rioters'; previously backed Bush/Kasich/Rubio over Trump in 2016; called Obama 'best orator.' Now in lockstep with Trump on Iran strikes (Iran hawk — FALSE on restraint). Issues page thin: NO abortion plank / NO marriage plank / NO school-choice plank / NO specific 2A plank / NO Big Tech plank. Christian-evangelical-aligned via Gilbert Christian Schools board service 2016-2020 (wife taught at GCS), but campaign Issues page does not reference life/abortion at all.
profile.religion: Christian (evangelical-aligned) — served Gilbert Christian Schools board 2016-2020 (Protestant evangelical); attended Jesuit High School Tampa FL (Catholic education background); wife Rebecca taught anatomy/biology at Gilbert Christian HS. Cites 'faith, family, future generations'; received 2023 House of Refuge Legacy Award for faith-based service. Does NOT publicly self-identify Catholic in campaign materials.
profile.background: Thomas James 'Jay' Feely (b. May 23 1976, Odessa FL). 14-season NFL placekicker (Falcons/Giants/Dolphins/Chiefs/Jets/Cardinals/Bears 2001-2014; 4 years AZ Cardinals 2010-2013); Cardinals Walter Payton Man of the Year 2013; CBS Sports NFL analyst post-retirement; former NFLPA rep (2011 lockout). Univ. of Michigan grad (1997 national-champ team). Launched 2026 House bid April 2025 for AZ-05 (Biggs seat); after Trump endorsed Mark Lamb in AZ-05, switched to AZ-01 Dec 19 2025. Trump dual-endorsement (w/ Swoboda) Jan 6 2026. NRCC MAGA Majority program March 2026. $740K+ raised Q1 2026. FEC committee H6AZ05190 (still references AZ-05 from original filing).

jay-feely.notes_set: AZ-01 OPEN-SEAT R PRIMARY CANDIDATE (Trump-endorsed Jan 6 2026 dual w/ Swoboda; Swoboda later withdrew). Cited TRUEs: 'finish the wall' (border q0); 'Boys should not be competing against girls in sports' + codify women's-sports fairness law (biblical_marriage q2); 'I will stand unapologetically with Israel' (Israel support, but doesn't violate foreign_policy q2 hostile-nation aid criterion). Cited FALSEs (CROSS-PARTY DEVIATIONS): publicly defended mail-in voting as 'safe' (thegatewaypundit.com 2025-10 — election q2, q3); 'in lockstep with Trump on the war with Iran' = Iran-hawk, NOT restraint (foreign q1 FALSE). Also publicly condemned Trump and Trump supporters on Jan 6 as 'failure in leadership' and 'huge mistake' — compared Trump J6 pardons to 'BLM rioters'; supported Bush/Kasich/Rubio over Trump 2016; called Obama 'best orator' — well-documented liberal/centrist past, recently pivoted to MAGA rhetoric to secure Trump endorsement. NO voting record. Christian-evangelical-aligned (Gilbert Christian Schools board) but campaign Issues page does NOT list abortion/life — that absence is itself a yellow flag on a Christian-conservative scorecard. NULL on all sanctity_of_life cells (do not infer); NULL on most family/christian_liberty cells. TCJA-extension support is the only cited econ position but maps to none of the federal econ rubric cells (CBDC/sound-money/BBA/usury/WEF) — all econ NULL. Generic 2A language only — all self_defense NULL.

2.note: Campaign Issues page: 'Boys should not be competing against girls in sports'; pledges to codify women's-athletics fairness law + oppose 'radical gender ideology' — affirms biological-sex categories
Publicly defended mail-in voting as 'safe' Oct 2025; claimed R who vote by mail are 'more educated' — opposes single-day-in-person-voting standard

3.note: Defended mass mail-in voting + refused to push back on weeks-long counting timelines — directly contradicts oppose-mass-mail-in / oppose-ballot-harvesting posture

0.note: Campaign Issues page pledges to 'finish the wall'

1.note: Reported 'in lockstep with Trump on the war with Iran' — supports Iran strikes, NOT withdrawal-from-forever-wars / AUMF-repeal posture

set.office: U.S. Representative AZ-01 (2026 R primary — NOT Trump-endorsed; open Schweikert seat; primary July 21 2026; tech-exec self-funder)

profile.confidence_note: 2026-06-02 — federal evidence sweep on AZ-01 open-seat candidate. Narrow but cited policy footprint: pro-life general (TRUE on conception affirmation), balanced-budget (TRUE on deficit/BBA), mandatory E-Verify (TRUE), sanctuary-cities opposition (TRUE), Iran restraint (TRUE — 'We can't be the global police for everyone'; called Iran war 'not sustainable for the globe or for this nation'). NOT Trump-endorsed (Trump backed Feely + Swoboda; Swoboda withdrew). profile.background: Technology executive — former President/CEO Narus Inc. (Boeing cybersecurity-analytics subsidiary); managing partner JLA Advisors (tech consulting); White House Presidential Innovation Fellow 2016 (Obama appointment, retained under Trump). BA Business Admin Washington State; Stanford GSB exec ed. Scottsdale resident; husband, father of four. FEC committee TROBOUGH FOR AZ (C00927400; H6AZ01447); $855K receipts thru Q1 2026 incl. substantial self-funding. Filed candidacy 2025-11-19; participated 2026-05-05 AZ PBS CD1 R debate.

john-trobough.notes_set: AZ-01 OPEN-SEAT R PRIMARY CANDIDATE (NOT Trump-endorsed — Trump dual-endorsed Feely+Swoboda; Swoboda later withdrew). Cited TRUEs: 'I am 100% pro-life, I am unafraid to say life begins at conception, and I will always defend the life of the unborn' (sanctity q0); 'government doesn't have a revenue problem—it has a spending problem' + 'balance the budget' (econ q2); 'I support mandatory E-Verify for all employers' (border q3); 'ending sanctuary cities policies' (border q2); 'We can't be the global police for everyone' + Iran war 'not sustainable for the globe or for this nation' (foreign q1 — restraint posture, qualified). Generic 2A language only ('Every American has the right to defend themselves, their family, and their property') — no specifics on constitutional carry, AWB, NFA repeal, ATF — all self_defense NULL. No marriage/family/christian_liberty/industry_capture policy footprint located — all NULL. Tech-exec background, Obama-era PIF appointment, supports Medicare drug-price negotiation (a populist anti-pharma stance but does NOT cleanly map to industry_capture q0 pharma-mandate rubric — null). Trailing in primary polling (~6%) per agent sweep.
